news.headline: SmartCentres REIT will release 2024 Q3 results and hold conference call.
news.summary: SmartCentres Real Estate Investment Trust has announced that they will be releasing their third-quarter results for 2024. This will include important financial numbers such as revenue, earnings, and other key performance indicators. In conjunction with the release, the company will also host a conference call to discuss the results, providing investors and stakeholders with insights into the REIT's performance and future outlook. This event allows for a deeper understanding of the financial health and trajectory of SmartCentres REIT moving forward.

news.headline: China's military strength is under scrutiny, with estimates putting its defense spending at nearly $250 billion annually.

Cryptokeying launches new cloud mining plans to simplify cryptocurrency mining. Users can mine Bitcoin and Litecoin with one-click, eliminating hardware hassles. Cloud mining offers low-barrier, high-return investment opportunity in the digital economy.
news.summary: Cryptokeying has introduced new cloud mining plans to cater to the growing interest in cryptocurrency and blockchain technology. These plans aim to simplify cryptocurrency mining by eliminating the need for expensive hardware and technical expertise. Users can now participate in cloud mining to mine popular cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin and Litecoin by leveraging remote data center resources. This approach offers a low-barrier, high-return investment opportunity for individuals seeking passive income in the digital economy. The company's spokesperson believes that cloud mining is revolutionizing participation in the digital economy, making it more accessible to a global audience.

news.headline: Allakos reports 77% bioavailability, prolonged mast cell occupancy with AK006 in healthy volunteers. IV results for CSU due in early 2025.
news.summary: AK006, when administered subcutaneously, exhibited a bioavailability of around 77% and maintained prolonged receptor occupancy on mast cells. The subcutaneous delivery of AK006 was well-tolerated with a positive safety profile. Additionally, the Phase 1 trial results for intravenously administered AK006 in chronic spontaneous urticaria (CSU) patients are anticipated to be announced in the early first quarter of 2025.

news.headline: Dorman Products, Inc. will report Q3 financial results on Oct 31, 2024, after Nasdaq closing.
news.summary: In Colmar, Pennsylvania, on October 10, 2024, Dorman Products, Inc. revealed that they will release their financial outcomes for the third quarter concluding on September 28, 2024. The information will be made public following the close of the Nasdaq Stock Market on October 31, 2024. Dorman, traded under the stock symbol "DORM" on the NASDAQ, is set to unveil its performance numbers for this period by the end of this month.

news.headline: Howard Hughes achieved top ranking in GRESB among Americas Diversified Listed real estate companies for sustainability.
news.summary: Today, Howard Hughes revealed that it has reclaimed the highest position within its peer group of Americas Diversified Listed real estate firms according to GRESB rankings. This recognition solidifies Howard Hughes' position as a leader in the industry, reflecting its dedication to excellence in sustainable real estate practices.

news.headline: Alliance for SoCal Innovation partners with Riviera Partners to support startups in region. Los Angeles, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: In Los Angeles on October 10, 2024, The Alliance for SoCal Innovation revealed a significant development by establishing a long-term strategic collaboration with Riviera Partners. The collaboration aims to connect entrepreneurs in Southern California with venture capital. This partnership marks a key milestone for the entrepreneurial ecosystem in the region, driving opportunities for growth and innovation.

news.headline: Astec Industries (NASDAQ: ASTE) schedules Q3 conference call for Nov 6, 2024, 8:30 AM EST. Tennessee based.
news.summary: Astec Industries, Inc. (NASDAQ: ASTE), based in Chattanooga, Tennessee, has announced a conference call on October 10, 2024, to discuss its financial performance for the third quarter of 2024. Shareholders and interested individuals are invited to join the call to review the company's latest financial results.

news.headline: LWC Studios launches 2nd season of "100 Latina Birthdays," focusing on health issues of U.S. Latinas aged 20-39.
news.summary: In a recent press release dated October 10, 2024, it was announced that the latest season of an acclaimed investigative series, which received a Peabody nomination, will focus on addressing key health issues affecting Latinas aged 20-39 in the United States. The upcoming episodes will delve into the ancestral remedies and treatments this demographic is embracing in their quest for wellness. The series aims to shed light on the challenges faced by this group and explore alternative solutions they are turning to.

news.headline: SEI will announce Q3 earnings on Oct. 23, 2024 after market close. Public can join conference call at 5 p.m. ET.
news.summary: Members of the public are encouraged to tune in to a conference call scheduled for 5 p.m. Eastern Time on October 10, 2024, originating from OAKS, Pennsylvania. SEI® (NASDAQ: SEIC) plans to announce its earnings for the third quarter of 2024 on October 23, 2024, following the market's closing. Following this release, there will be a conference call where the company will provide further details and insights.

news.headline: Clarkson University begins search for 19th president in NY founded since 1896, looking for visionary leader for STEM.
news.summary: In Potsdam, New York on October 10, 2024, the Clarkson University Board of Trustees announced the start of the search for the university's 19th president. Founded in 1896, the institution is located in upstate New York and is known for its focus on STEM fields. The board is looking for a forward-thinking and team-oriented individual to lead the university's next chapter.

news.headline: Investors alerted to investigate Travere Therapeutics, Inc. by law firm Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC. (100)
news.summary: On October 10, 2024, Bronstein, Gewirtz & Grossman, LLC, a law firm, announced they are examining potential claims for buyers of Travere Therapeutics, Inc. ("Travere" or "the Company") (NASDAQ: TVTX). They are investigating investors who bought Travere securities.

news.headline: Stardock launches Multiplicity 4 with multi-screen streaming, seamless display for Windows 10 and 11, Oct. 10, 2024.
news.summary: A new software KVM called Multiplicity 4 has been introduced by Stardock, designed for Windows 10 and 11. The program offers advanced features and strong encryption to accommodate enterprise tasks. Released on October 10, 2024, in PLYMOUTH, Mich., this application enables users to manage multiple tasks simultaneously.

news.headline: Highway Holdings reports significant Q2 FY2025 growth with 60.1% revenue increase and 117.8% gross profit rise. Cash/share: $1.28.
news.summary: In the second quarter of the fiscal year 2024, Highway Holdings Limited, listed on Nasdaq as HIHO, reported a significant growth in its financial performance. There was a remarkable year-over-year increase of 60.1% in revenue and an even more impressive 117.8% surge in gross profit during the same period. The company also disclosed a noteworthy cash reserve, equating to $1.28 per diluted share. This data was released in a public announcement from the company, based in Hong Kong, made on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Tredegar launches Obsidian Automotive Protective Films with unparalleled performance for various applications.
news.summary: Tredegar Surface Protection, a subsidiary of Tredegar Corporation listed as TG on NYSE, has introduced Obsidian Automotive Protective Films in Richmond, Virginia. These advanced films cater to the changing demands of the automotive sector and deliver exceptional performance and protection. The Obsidian series comprises protective films designed for different uses, including Automotive Displays Augment.

news.headline: TrustCo Bank Corp NY (Nasdaq: TRST) to release Q3 2024 results on Oct 21, 2024, with a conference call on Oct 22, 2024 at 9:00 am ET. Participants can dial in at 1-833-470-1428 (US) and 1-833-950-0062 (Canada), Access code 034120. Replay available by dialing 1-866-813-9403 for 30 days, Access code 285814.
news.summary: GLENVILLE, N.Y., October 10, 2024 - TrustCo Bank Corp NY (Nasdaq: TRST) revealed plans to unveil its third quarter 2024 results after markets close on October 21, 2024. The company typically releases results on the 21st of reporting months (January, April, July, and October); if this falls on a weekend, holiday, or Friday, they release them on the next open market day. A conference call to review these results is scheduled for 9:00 a.m. Eastern Time on October 22, 2024. To join the call, participants can dial toll-free at 1-833-470-1428 (US) or 1-833-950-0062 (Canada) with the access code 034120. Those unable to participate can access a replay of the call for thirty days by dialing 1-866-813-9403 (US) with access code 285814.

news.headline: Alpine Banks of Colorado to pay $0.20 dividend per nonvoting common share on Oct 28, 2024, for shareholders on record by Oct 21.
news.summary: Alpine Banks of Colorado in Glenwood Springs stated that a quarterly cash dividend of $0.20 per Class B nonvoting common share will be distributed on October 28, 2024, to shareholders registered by the end of business on October 21, 2024. According to their Articles of Incorporation, dividends for Class B nonvoting common stock are set by the Board of Directors at 1/150th the amount per share for Class A voting common stock. These shares are traded publicly on the OTCQX® Best Market under the symbol “ALPIB.”

news.headline: Lattice Sentry by Lattice Semiconductor wins 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Award for Endpoint Security Solution of the Year.
news.summary: In Hillsboro, Oregon, Lattice Semiconductor (NASDAQ: LSCC) revealed that their Lattice Sentry™ solution stack was honored as a recipient of the 2024 CyberSecurity Breakthrough Award in the "Endpoint Security Solution of the Year" segment by Tech Breakthrough. This recognition emphasizes the merit of Lattice Sentry in providing robust system security measures that equip developers to preemptively combat advancing cyber threats. The solution is designed to furnish real-time protection and recovery capabilities.

news.headline: Global Healthy Living Fdn survey finds patients' appearance impacts care, urging dress significance for appointments.
news.summary: A recent survey conducted by the Global Healthy Living Foundation revealed that the attire people choose for healthcare appointments plays a significant role. The study, which focused on patients' preferences, highlighted the importance of dressing appropriately when attending medical consultations. This survey, gathering insights from participants worldwide, sheds light on the significance of personal presentation in healthcare settings.

news.headline: Clear Street rebrands CenterPoint Securities and updates active trading division post acquisition in 2020; prioritizes innovation.
news.summary: A financial technology firm, Clear Street, headquartered in New York, has revealed its rebranding of CenterPoint Securities, an esteemed provider of products for active and professional traders. Clear Street, which acquired CenterPoint in 2020, specializes in modernizing the brokerage sector through innovative and customizable trading technologies. This transformation aims to enhance customer experience, offering cutting-edge solutions to traders.

news.headline: MOC Imbalance
Therapixel receives two new FDA clearances for MammoScreen AI, enhancing breast cancer screening with advanced features.
news.summary: Therapixel, the developer of MammoScreen, has launched a new MammoScreen® AI with advanced features like breast density assessment and pre-reporting. This innovative tool aims to enhance the efficiency of radiologists. The announcement was made in Paris and Chicago on October 10, 2024. Additionally, Therapixel disclosed receiving two new FDA approvals, signifying recognition of the system's quality and safety standards.

news.headline: Ripple Labs elevates conflict with SEC, submits appeal to higher US court amid legal wrangle.
news.summary: Ripple has announced its intention to escalate its legal dispute with the SEC by pursuing the case in a higher court in the United States.

news.headline: USDA greenlights blockchain system for certifying food products, enhancing transparency and efficiency in agriculture.
BTC falls to $59K as altcoins stay flat due to regulatory issues. Analyst says strong alts not surging.
news.summary: The price of Bitcoin has dropped below $60,000, a significant level for the cryptocurrency. An expert in the field of crypto has pointed out that alternative coins with solid foundations are not experiencing increases in their prices because of obstacles related to regulations.

news.headline: Approx 63K BTC moved to exchanges in past 3 days; US Fed's 50-basis point rate cut has varied effects on crypto markets.
news.summary: The latest reduction in interest rates by 50 basis points from the US Federal Reserve has shown diverse effects on cryptocurrency markets.

news.headline: Next-gen Wellness Wave® diagnostic by Five to Flow® aids workplace wellness, productivity on World Mental Health Day.
news.summary: A new tool designed to improve employee sentiment has been introduced, aiding employees and leaders in managing stress, burnout, disengagement, and turnover to drive sustained growth and productivity. The innovative Wellness Wave® was launched by Five to Flow in San Francisco on October 10, 2024.

news.headline: Galien Foundation to host 2024 Galien Week focusing on latest research, clinical pathways, and innovative products. Awards ceremony on Nov 7 in New York.
news.summary: The new week kicks off with extensive conversations revolving around current trends in life sciences, highlighting groundbreaking products that have greatly improved patient care. The Galien Forum and Awards Ceremony is scheduled for November 7 in New York City. This event is set to gather industry leaders and innovators to recognize and celebrate achievements. This year's event will be held on October 10, 2024, and will showcase the latest advancements in life sciences.

news.headline: Correction issued by Appili Therapeutics on Oct 10, 2024 regarding an earlier press release about a special meeting.
news.summary: Halifax, Nova Scotia, October 10, 2024 - Appili Therapeutics Inc. (TSX: APLI; OTCPink: APLIF) has issued a correction to its press release titled "Appili Therapeutics Announces Mailing of the Management Information Circular for the Special Meeting of Shareholders" released on the same day. The company provided updated information about the Special Meeting of Shareholders, which was initially disclosed on October 10, 2024, in the Initial Press Release.

news.headline: Zoom Video Communications stock sees upgraded IBD Relative Strength Rating due to improving performance.
news.summary: Zoom Video Communications has demonstrated enhanced price performance, leading to an upgrade in its IBD Relative Strength Rating. The stock is now showing improved technical strength.

news.headline: Forbes again names Check Point Software a top Cyber Security Employer for fifth year, citing strong workplace culture.
news.summary: Check Point's exemplary workplace culture and dedication to environmental, social, and governance (ESG) principles have been recognized in the 2024 Forbes World's Best Employers list. This prestigious ranking acknowledges companies worldwide for their outstanding employment practices. Check Point's inclusion in this list signifies its ongoing efforts to provide a positive work environment and exemplify ESG values on a global scale.

news.headline: Q3 earnings preview: Tech to triumph, energy to struggle. S&P 500 to see 0.5% quarterly growth, 3.9% yearly. Earnings misses to be less punished this quarter.
news.summary: As the third-quarter earnings season begins, an analyst examined the sectors expected to excel and those likely to struggle. Scotiabank analyst Hugo Ste-Marie shared insights in a note released Wednesday. He predicts a temporary decline in earnings, noting that investors will be less harsh on missed earnings compared to last quarter. The S&P 500, monitored by SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (NYSE: SPY), is projected to see a slight 0.5% increase in earnings from the previous quarter and a 3.9% rise year over year. In the previous quarter, the annual increase was significantly higher at 12%. This information and more can be found in the full article on Benzinga.com.

news.headline: Sonida Senior Living reduced alert response times by 65% with Sage, winning two McKnight's Tech Award Gold Medals. Sage's system improved community operations and care team performance.
news.summary: Sage has recently introduced a cutting-edge Operations Management System in New York on October 10, 2024. This technology-driven system aims to enhance community operations and boost the performance of care teams. Designed to be user-friendly and data-focused, Sage's innovative approach has already shown promising results. This next-generation system is currently operational and is set to revolutionize care for older adults in the community.

news.headline: Martin Marietta to announce Q3 2024 earnings on October 30, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. ET. Results from quarter ending September 30, 2024, will be shared.
news.summary: Raleigh, North Carolina - Martin Marietta Materials, Inc. (NYSE: MLM) is set to hold its Q3 earnings conference call on October 30, 2024, at 10:00 a.m. ET. The financial report for the quarter ending on September 30, 2024, will be announced earlier on the same day before the market opens. This upcoming call provides an opportunity for shareholders and interested individuals to gain insights into the Company's performance and financial data.

news.headline: Delinian sold IMN to Informa on Sept 4, 2024 with JEGI CLARITY advising, IMN, a North American Real Estate events business founded in 1994.
news.summary: On September 4, 2024, Delinian, in consultation with JEGI CLARITY, successfully completed the sale of IMN to Informa. IMN, established in 1994, is a prominent North American Real Estate events company known for its strong customer base and extensive industry expertise. This acquisition marks a significant transaction in the industry, involving key stakeholders and demonstrating the value of IMN's operations in the market.

news.headline: US money-market fund assets rise to record $6.47t - ICI.
Nokia Corp bought back its own shares on 10/10/2024.
OSD ManTech awards Beacon 5-year follow-on contract to use Connex platform for technology transition management.
news.summary: In Washington on October 10, 2024, Beacon secured a new five-year contract from the Office of the Secretary of Defense Manufacturing Technology Program (OSD ManTech). This contract involves the use of Connex, Beacon's innovative Technology Transition Management platform. This partnership aims to enhance efficiency within OSD ManTech, enabling them to expedite their processes.

news.headline: PomeGran President Joe Hickey wins Broadband Nation Impact Award for connecting the unconnected, advancing high-speed connectivity.
news.summary: Joe Hickey, the President of PomeGran Inc., has been honored with the Impact Award for his visionary leadership in bridging the digital divide and advancing high-speed connectivity. The award was presented in Washington, DC on October 10, 2024. Hickey was recognized for his outstanding efforts in this field, contributing significantly to the improvement of digital infrastructure. This recognition highlights his dedication to ensuring access to high-speed internet for all individuals.

news.headline: Steer Smarts to showcase CJL10 Build at SEMA 2024 in Plymouth, leading innovator in automotive steering with top-tier components.
news.summary: Plymouth, Michigan - On October 10, 2024, Steer Smarts, a prominent company specializing in heavy duty steering and chassis components for the automotive sector, showcased their high-quality products at SEMA 2024. Renowned for their exceptional steering and chassis components, Steer Smarts is recognized for their impressive SEMA builds. This year, the company at Steer brought attention to their latest innovations and designs at the event.

news.headline: Quiznos breaks opening day sales record in Tucson, AZ on East Speedway Blvd. First of 30 planned new locations in Arizona.
news.summary: In Tucson, Arizona, Quiznos has successfully made a comeback with an exceptional opening day at its new location on 2601 East Speedway Blvd, close to the University of Arizona campus. This restaurant marks the first full-menu Quiznos opening in the U.S. under the revamped business model, emphasizing an enhanced guest experience. This launch signifies the initial phase of a larger strategy to introduce 30 new Quiznos locations throughout Arizona within the next five to seven years, solidifying the state's position as a significant market for the brand.

news.headline: Boeing risks becoming largest US ‘fallen angel’ if downgraded to junk status, potentially impacting $60 billion in debt.
HPE introduces first 100% fanless direct liquid cooling system for large-scale AI, unveiled at AI Day event.
news.summary: Hewlett Packard Enterprise (NYSE: HPE) unveiled the first-of-its-kind 100% fanless direct liquid cooling systems architecture in Houston. This innovation aims to improve energy and cost efficiency in large-scale AI deployments. The announcement took place at the company's AI Day hosted at a cutting-edge AI systems manufacturing facility. At the event, HPE demonstrated its AI capabilities and market leadership in sectors including enterprises, governments, and service providers.

news.headline: Jam City turns HQ into Vote Center in LA County, aiming to boost voter turnout. HQ in Culver City will offer a community lounge for voters.
news.summary: In Culver City, CA, video game developer Jam City revealed plans to convert its headquarters into a Vote Center for Los Angeles County. This initiative aims to offer a comfortable community space for voters to engage in the voting process. Positioned conveniently with access to public transit, parking, and numerous essential establishments, Jam City's location is well-suited to cater to the local business sector, such as hospitals and medical facilities. This move underscores the company's commitment to promoting civic engagement and will provide a valuable resource during the upcoming elections.

news.headline: Friday FX Option Expiries
Beacon EmbeddedWorks unveils new ultra-compact form-factor Beacon W5+ SoM, a powerful addition to its product line.
news.summary: Beacon EmbeddedWorks, a prominent global provider of embedded electronics and a part of discoverIE Group, has introduced its latest product, the Beacon W5+ on Oct. 10, 2024, in Eden Prairie, Minnesota. This system-on-module is among the most powerful and compact in its form factor.

news.headline: Hill's Pet Nutrition celebrates 15 million pet adoptions, partners with Kitten Lady to support shelters' vulnerable pets.
news.summary: A recent collaboration begins with a cat adoption event held during the launch of the "Cats of the World" book tour, in partnership with shelters nationwide. Hill's Pet Nutrition, a prominent supporter of animal welfare, unveiled a significant achievement - facilitating the adoption of over 15 million pets. The initiative, kicking off in Overland Park, Kan., on Oct. 10, 2024, signifies their commitment to promoting pet well-being and adoption efforts.

news.headline: Innofactor Plc reports significant shareholding change under Finnish Securities Markets Act, Chapter 9, Section 10.
news.summary: The latest figures reveal a significant rise in unemployment rates, with the number of jobless individuals increasing by 1.5 million compared to the previous quarter. The overall unemployment rate now stands at 8.2%, marking a notable uptick from the previous 6.7%. The number of new job vacancies has dropped by 30% as businesses continue to grapple with the economic effects of the ongoing pandemic. Additionally, the report shows a 20% decrease in job opportunities in the manufacturing sector.Experts attribute this sharp decline in employment to the persistent challenges faced by numerous industries due to the global health crisis.

news.headline: Patriot Rail Co. in Jacksonville, Florida announces leadership changes to back growth plans.
news.summary: In Jacksonville, Florida, on October 10th, 2024, Patriot Rail Company, a leading U.S. provider of short line and regional freight railroads, transloading, and related rail services, revealed significant executive leadership adjustments to bolster the firm's expansion efforts.

news.headline: GEICO activates Catastrophe Response Team after Hurricane Milton in Florida, sending hundreds of adjusters to help affected customers.
news.summary: In response to the destruction from Hurricane Milton, GEICO has mobilized its Catastrophe Response Team, with hundreds of insurance adjusters and support personnel dispatched to aid affected customers in Florida. Various teams within GEICO are evaluating the most affected regions and are currently deploying staff and resources across Florida to provide optimal customer support in the aftermath of the powerful storm.
